Enterprise agreement outlining terms and responsibilities. | | – | – | – | | ![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/image-1041.png) “Thinkific offers exceptional scalability, enabling businesses to grow their course offerings and student base without any limitations. It can handle unlimited courses, students, and bandwidth, ensuring businesses can expand their e-learning offerings without worrying about technical constraints.” Guy Marion Chief Marketing Officer [Read the case study](https://www.thinkific.com/case-studies/chargebee/) ## Frequently asked questions ► Who is Thinkific for? Thinkific serves 35,000 customers in more than 100 countries across the world and spanning a multitude of industries, from farming to finance, personal training to high tech. Those customers have earned $3.7 billion on the platform and have impacted 214 million learners with their courses, communities, and content. Our platform supports businesses of all stages but is built to scale alongside you. It’s straightforward and AI-enable so anyone can use it and launch quickly, but it also offers advanced features, powerful integrations, and award-winning support required by larger organizations. Thinkific’s top-earning customers typically fall into three different categories: - **Subject matter experts**, typically looking to expand their revenue streams or move beyond the earning limits of their own working hours - **Academies or professional training businesses** seeking a powerful solution to help them scale and manage a high volume of customers - **Companies**, large often market-defining businesses that are looking to grow and/or diversify their revenue while reducing churn with online learning Don’t see yourself in those three categories? We probably still have a solution that’s right for your business. Book a demo today. ► Does Thinkific have a free plan? No, instead, you can explore the whole platform with a **30-day free trial**. Build courses, host communities and test all the AI tools for a full month before you pay a cent. ► What is Thinkific and how does it work? Thinkific is an online learning commerce platform for businesses to create and sell courses, communities, memberships, digital downloads, coaching, webinars, and other digital learning products. Sell to both consumers and other businesses (B2B and B2C) using intuitive, easy-to-use tools and AI assistance. With Thinkific’s features, design an engaging, customized learning experience, manage students, track progress, and handle payments and selling, all in one place. ► Is it easy to get started? Thinkific was designed to get your business up and running without any advanced technical experience. **You don’t need to be a developer to build your site and online courses.** With AI tools like the Course Outline Generator, onboarding prompts, and step-by-step guidance, create and launch your online learning business quickly. And because every account starts with a 30-day free trial, you can build your first course risk-free. ► Can I cancel or change my account at any time? Yes. If you are on either Basic, Start, or Grow you can upgrade, downgrade or cancel at any time, including during your 30-day trial. ► I already have a website. Can I integrate it with Thinkific? Yes. While Thinkific allows you to build an entire website, you can use the platform for digital learning product creation alone. When integrating with Thinkific, you can use Thinkific as the education portion to complement your existing website, whether it’s custom built or created on a CMS like WordPress. Either way, you’ll be able to create a fully integrated and seamless experience, from your domain and URLs to the visual branding. Your customers will see your courses, communities, and other learning products alongside your main site as one holistic ecosystem. ► Do I need a separate web host? No, you don’t need a separate web host. If you have one, you can use Thinkific with your existing site. Otherwise, Thinkific hosts your site and even manages your payments and e-commerce, allowing you to focus on scaling your business. ► Can I use a custom domain for my Thinkific site? Yes. Use a custom domain for your Thinkific site to align with your brand and provide a smooth experience for your audience. Connect your existing domain or purchase a new one directly through Thinkific. ► What payment gateways does Thinkific support? Thinkific offers its own custom payment processor, Thinkific Payments. This allows you to manage payments and subscriptions, and run reports all in one place, without relying on third-party processors. Thinkific also supports Stripe and PayPal as payment gateways. Third-party payment gateway fees will apply if you are based [in select countries](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/1500012376321-Thinkific-Payments-Supported-Countries-and-Transaction-Fees). ► How are payments processed? Full e-commerce payment processing is included. We accept all major credit cards with a simple and secure checkout, and you receive instant access to your funds in your account. We provide an SSL certificate to help ensure that all your data and customer information is secure. Note: We have fees [in select countries](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/1500012376321-Thinkific-Payments-Supported-Countries-and-Transaction-Fees) that can be avoided when using Thinkific payments. ► What fees does Thinkific charge for payment processing? **What’s the standard processing fees?** When using our built-in processor, Thinkific Payments, we offer pricing in line with other processors like Stripe and Paypal at 2.9%. **Are there any additional fees?** When using third-party processors like Stripe or Paypal on Thinkific, an additional third-party payment gateway fee applies and it varies per plan type. More information can be found [here](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/22383950439575-Third-Party-Payment-Gateway-Fee-FAQ). When using different payment methods that are enabled by default on TCommerce (i.e. Apple Pay and Google Pay), the transaction fees vary. More information can be found [here](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/1500012376321-Thinkific-Payments-Supported-Countries-and-Transaction-Fees#apm). Customers processing payments on Thinkific Payments will not incur a third-party payment gateway fee. Note: Standard processing fees from Stripe and PayPal apply. **What is TCommerce and how does it help me?** [TCommerce](https://thinkific.com/features/sell-courses/thinkific-payments/) is Thinkific’s integrated payments and selling solution, powered by Thinkific Payments, designed to help you sell more and save time. With features like: - Order Bumps - Buy Now, Pay Later options - Gifting - Group Orders - Automation tools like Smart Credit Card Retries - Incomplete Purchase Reminders (abandoned cart reminders) TCommerce is designed to boost revenue and streamline administrative tasks with automated sales tax solutions, bookkeeping integrations, and comprehensive reporting and analytics. By using Thinkific Payments as your payment processor, get access to all the tools on TCommerce for free, allowing you to manage payments, subscriptions, and sales without relying on third-party processors. ► What is included in the "Spaces per community" feature? Spaces allow you to create distinct areas within your Thinkific Community, each with its own topics and discussions. This helps you organize content, foster engagement, and build a stronger community around your courses and learning products. We also offer exclusive areas for focused engagement called Private Spaces. These aremember-only areasfor cohorts, teams, or select groups to collaborate and share resources. ► Does Thinkific support multiple languages for course creation? Yes. Thinkific supports multiple languages, allowing you to create and deliver courses in various languages to reach a global audience. Customize your site’s language settings and student communication to provide a localized experience. ► Is SCORM compliance available, and on which plans? Yes. SCORM is available on Thinkific’s Plus plan. Create engaging, interactive learning experiences with games, choose-your-own-adventure paths, and simulations through SCORM courses, while seamlessly integrating your learning content onto Thinkific. ### Hit your revenue targets. Grow your impact. We can help you launch online learning experiences that drive revenue and retention. Talk to one of our experts about it today. [Talk to sales](https://www.thinkific.com/plus/plus-customer-enquiries/) [Start free trial](https://courses.thinkific.com/signup?plan=low_22&interval=month) ![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/G2BestSoftware2026-Badge-Global-Canadian.png)![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/G2BestSoftware2026-Badge-Persona-EducationProducts.png)![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/TrustRadius-BuyersChoice-2026.png)![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/G2users-love-us.png)![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/g2-momentum-leader-2026.png)

web.markdown:
[All Articles](https://www.ruzuku.com/learn/articles)

In this article

Thinkific's paid plans range from $49/month (Basic) to $199/month (Grow), with 0% transaction fees on every tier. The free plan was removed in 2025 and replaced with a 14-day trial. Here's what each plan includes and how Thinkific's pricing compares to other platforms.

## Thinkific Pricing Plans Overview (2026)

Thinkific offers three standard plans plus a custom enterprise tier. All paid plans include unlimited courses and 0% platform transaction fees.

| Plan | Monthly | Annual | Annual Savings |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Basic | $49/mo | $36/mo | $156/year (25% off) |
| Start | $99/mo | $74/mo | $300/year (25% off) |
| Grow | $199/mo | $149/mo | $600/year (25% off) |
| Plus | Custom pricing — contact Thinkific sales |

### What Each Plan Includes

**Basic ($49/mo)** — The entry-level plan for new course creators:

- Unlimited courses and students
- 1 community space
- 5 coaching or webinar sessions
- 5 digital downloads
- Abandoned cart recovery emails
- Custom domain

**Start ($99/mo)** — For creators who need more flexibility:

- Everything in Basic
- Unlimited live lessons, memberships, and digital downloads
- Unlimited coaching/webinar sessions
- HTML/CSS editing for site customization
- Course bundles
- Certificates

**Grow ($199/mo)** — For established creators who need advanced tools:

- Everything in Start
- 3 community spaces
- Remove Thinkific branding
- Advanced analytics and reporting
- Group orders, invoicing, and gifting
- Payment plans for students
- API access
- Priority support

## What Happened to Thinkific's Free Plan?

Thinkific's free plan — which allowed 1 course with 0% transaction fees — is no longer available. As of 2026, Thinkific offers a 14-day free trial instead.

This is a meaningful change for creators who are just getting started. The free plan let you build and sell a course indefinitely without paying a subscription. Now, you need to commit to at least $49/month (or $36/month annually) before you can sell anything.

If starting free matters to you, other options include [Teachable](https://www.ruzuku.com/learn/articles/is-teachable-any-good)(which still has a free tier, though with steep 10% + $1 transaction fees) or [Ruzuku's free trial](https://www.ruzuku.com/start-free).

## Thinkific Annual vs Monthly Pricing

Annual billing saves 25% across all Thinkific plans. Here's what that means in real numbers:

| Plan | Monthly Total/Year | Annual Total/Year | You Save |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Basic | $588 | $432 | $156 |
| Start | $1,188 | $888 | $300 |
| Grow | $2,388 | $1,788 | $600 |

Annual billing makes sense once you've committed to the platform. If you're still evaluating, start monthly — the 14-day trial lets you test before committing, and you can switch to annual billing later.

## Payment Processing Fees (All Plans)

Thinkific charges 0% platform transaction fees, but you still pay standard payment processing fees:

- **Stripe** — 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction (US cards)
- **PayPal** — 3.49% + regional fixed fee per transaction
- **International cards** — Additional 1% on Stripe for non-US cards

These are the same rates most platforms pass through. The key difference with Thinkific is that there's no additional platform fee on top — unlike [Teachable's Starter plan](https://www.ruzuku.com/learn/articles/teachable-pricing-transaction-fees), which adds a 7.5% platform fee.

## How Does Thinkific's Pricing Compare to Other Platforms?

| Platform | Starting Price | Platform Tx Fees | Payment Plans |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Thinkific | $49/mo | 0% | Grow ($199/mo) |
| Ruzuku | $99/mo | 0% | Core ($99/mo) |
| Teachable | $39/mo | 7.5% on Starter | Builder ($89/mo) |
| Kajabi | $89/mo (Kickstarter) | 0% | All plans |
| Podia | $39/mo | 5% on Mover | Shaker ($89/mo) |

Thinkific is competitively priced — its Basic plan ($49/mo) offers unlimited courses with 0% transaction fees, which is a strong starting point. The main trade-off is that payment plans require the Grow tier ($199/mo), while platforms like [Ruzuku](https://www.ruzuku.com/compare/thinkific) and Teachable offer payment plans at lower price points.

For a full feature comparison beyond pricing, see our [Ruzuku vs Thinkific comparison](https://www.ruzuku.com/compare/thinkific) or our [7 Best Thinkific Alternatives](https://www.ruzuku.com/learn/articles/thinkific-alternatives). For a deep dive into hidden costs, see our [Thinkific pricing guide](https://www.ruzuku.com/compare/thinkific-pricing).

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does Thinkific cost per month?

Thinkific's plans cost $49/month (Basic), $99/month (Start), or $199/month (Grow) on monthly billing. Annual billing saves 25%, bringing prices to $36, $74, and $149/month respectively. There's also a Plus plan with custom enterprise pricing.

### Does Thinkific have a free plan in 2026?

No. Thinkific removed its free plan and now offers a 14-day free trial instead. The free plan previously included 1 course with 0% transaction fees.

### Does Thinkific charge transaction fees?

No. Thinkific charges 0% platform transaction fees on all paid plans. You only pay standard payment processing fees through Stripe (2.9% + $0.30) or PayPal (3.49% + regional fixed fee).

# Thinkific Pricing Plans 2025: Which Plan Is Right For You?

![Thinkific Pricing Plans Which Plan Is Right For You](https://cdn.elearningindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/Thinkific-Pricing-Plans-Which-Plan-Is-Right-For-You.jpg)

Roman Samborskyi/Shutterstock.com


Summary:

Thinkific offers many pricing plans, each with its own features. Read this detailed guide on Thinkific pricing and decide what's the best option for your business needs.


## About Thinkific

If you want to learn more about Thinkific and all the details about the Thinkific pricing plans, you're in the right place. Let's start by saying that this platform is all about making you feel like an expert when it comes to building and selling online courses. Why's that? Because Thinkific gives you all the tools you need in order to create, market, and sell your own courses without necessarily being tech-savvy. You can customize your course website, make your content stand out, and even create quizzes, assignments, and certificates for your students. Also, keep in mind that Thinkific doesn't just help you create courses; it's got tools to promote them, too, like SEO optimization, email campaigns, integrations with payment systems, etc.

## Latest Thinkific Pricing: Quick Overview

Thinkific's pricing plans are designed to accommodate everyone, from those who engage with course creation for the first time to those who are pros. Below, you will find an overview of the [Thinkific](https://elearningindustry.com/directory/elearning-software/thinkific "Thinkific software") pricing plans so you can choose what works best for you.

* * *

* * *

First, we have the **Free** plan, which is a great way to start, but it has limited features. Then, there's the **Basic** plan, with a starting price of $49 per month, which offers you unlimited courses, live chat, and a custom domain. Next, you can check out the **Start** plan, with an original price of $99 per month, which has all the Basic plan's features but also adds memberships and advanced integrations. There's also the **Grow** plan at $199 per month, which has all the advanced tools that are perfect for scaling your business and expanding into multiple learning products. The **Expand** plan is the most expensive one, at $499 per month, and is perfect for teams, as it offers more admin accounts. Lastly, Thinkific pricing includes the **Plus** plan, which is intended for enterprises and has custom pricing models. Let's dive deeper into each Thinkific pricing plan.

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Plan** | **Key Features** | **Pricing** |
| Free | Supports multimedia content uploads, drag-and-drop course builder, and single course creation. | Free |
| Basic | Drag-and-drop course builder, custom domain, email support, and live chat support. | $49 Per Month ($36 Per Month If Billed Annually) |
| Start | Live lessons, advanced website and course-building options, assignment creation, and membership plans. | $99 Per Month ($74 Per Month When Billed Annually) |
| Grow | Bulk enrollments, access to API, exam integration, question bank, and white-label mobile app. | $199 Per Month ($149 Per Month When Billed Annually) |
| Expand | Unlimited spaces for each community, access to 15 administrator accounts, and revenue sharing (10 partners max). | $499 A month ($374 When Billed Annually) |
| Custom | CRM integration, white-label emails, unlimited administrators, unlimited products, and enterprise API access. | Custom |

## Thinkific Pricing Comparison

### Thinkific Free Plan

#### Key Features Of The Free Plan

The first key feature of the plan is that it's free. However, as we've already mentioned, it has its limits. Still, you can create just one course with unlimited students, which is a good start if you want to test your content. You also get access to a drag-and-drop course builder, meaning you can create your course easily, even if you're a beginner. The Free plan also comes with the ability to upload a variety of multimedia content, such as video, audio, PDFs, and quizzes. This allows you to make your lessons engaging rather than just offering boring text-based modules. Plus, you can use email support in case you encounter problems. But what about learner assessments? Although limited, the Thinkific Free pricing plan allows you to add surveys and quizzes to review your audience's progress.

#### What's Not So Great?

As mentioned above, the free Thinkific pricing plan offers a single course, so if you plan to create multiple courses, you'll need to upgrade to another pricing plan eventually. The customization options are also a bit limited. You can change the basics, of course, but you won't get access to the full variety of themes or the more advanced design features that are available in the paid plans. Probably the most significant disadvantage is the fact that you can't remove Thinkific's branding on the Free plan. So, if you want to add your own logo or branding to your course and fully own it, you'll need to pay for another plan. Additionally, there's no access to advanced marketing tools, which might make it more difficult for you to expand your student base.

#### Who Can Benefit From Thinkific's Free Plan?

Thinkific's Free plan is perfect for beginners or those who see course creation as a hobby. It's also a great fit for educators or professionals who want to offer a single high-quality course. This Thinkific pricing plan gives them all the tools to start or test their content to see if it works before scaling up.

#### Free Plan Demo: Video Lessons With Content

The Free Thinkific pricing plan allows you to test your lessons. You can easily upload and organize your video lessons and add content like PDFs or quizzes, too. Just like that, you get a demo of a mini-course with a couple of short video lessons to see what your courses will look like, all on a free platform.

### Thinkific Basic Plan At $49 Per Month ($36 Per Month If Billed Annually)

#### Key Features Of The Basic Plan

This plan has gathered some great features, especially for its price. Unlike the Free plan, you can create unlimited courses, which is appealing enough to make you choose it. You also get to use your own domain name, making the website that hosts your courses look more professional. This Thinkific pricing plan also offers email support, so if you ever need help, their team is just an email away. What's more, you can add coupons and promo codes to boost sales, release your content gradually, send your learners automated emails, and group your courses into bundles to earn more.

#### What's Not So Great?

The Thinkific Basic plan has its own drawbacks. First, unlike the more expensive plans, you can't host live lessons, which isn't ideal if you're looking to interact with students in real time. And speaking of interactions with students, this Thinkific pricing plan doesn't give you access to Thinkific Communities, a feature that allows you to build a learning community around your course. Lastly, same as the Free plan, you can't add your own logo to your courses.

#### Who Can Benefit From Thinkific's Basic Plan?

This plan is just right for beginners who want their courses to look professional. It's also great for small businesses that want to train their employees or individuals who are looking for extra income. Coaches and educators, in general, can also benefit from this plan if they want to offer simple but quality courses without fancy add-ons.

### Thinkific Start Plan At $99 Per Month ($74 Per Month When Billed Annually)

#### Key Features Of The Start Plan

The Thinkific Start plan comes with many features that aim to help you scale up and add more elements to your online courses. First off, you get access to live lessons and webinars. This means that you can now engage with your students in real time and build an interactive learning experience. You also get to create memberships and subscriptions, which gives you the opportunity to have recurring revenue. Now, it also adds more payment plans. Whether you want to offer one-time payments, custom pricing models, or even coupons, now you can. The plan also includes integrations with email marketing apps.

#### What's Not So Great?

While this Thinkific pricing plan offers many features, it still lacks some more advanced options. For example, you can't get advanced analytics or remove the Thinkific logo. Most importantly, though, the price ($99/month) may feel expensive to those who are just starting out.

#### Who Can Benefit From Thinkific's Start Plan?

If you're already running courses and looking for ways to boost engagement, build a community through memberships, or introduce more flexible payment options, the Thinkific Start plan is for you. It's also useful for coaches, consultants, and small business owners who want to offer live lessons and create ongoing content for their subscribers.

### Thinkific Grow Plan At $199 Per Month ($149 Per Month When Billed Annually)

#### Key Features Of The Grow Plan

With the Grow plan, you get everything from the Start plan, plus many more powerful tools, like the ability to Thinkific's branding and replace it with your own. This gives your business a more professional appearance, which is necessary if you're working with other companies or institutions. This Thinkific pricing plan allows you bulk enrollments, which basically means that if a company wants to sign up all its employees at once, now it's possible. With the Grow plan, you also have access to more customization options, advanced reporting on learner progress, priority at support, and, of course, learning communities.

#### What's Not So Great?

Of course, $199 a month is a big investment, which may hurt a company's budget if they don't fully utilize all the features. However, the investment could pay off in the future. Additionally, while the customization options are great, they require some coding knowledge. If you don't have a developer around to help you, it might get a bit overwhelming. What's more, Thinkific's marketing tools are limited compared to other platforms. This results in needing external tools to get your work done.

#### Who Can Benefit From Thinkific's Grow Plan?

This plan is ideal for professional course creators and businesses with a large number of learners who need branding over their courses and require more advanced reporting and customization. So, if you're looking for more flexibility and advanced tools, this Thinkific pricing plan is exactly what you need.

### Thinkific Expand Plan At $499 A Month ($374 When Billed Annually)

#### Key Features Of The Expand Plan

The Thinkific Expand plan is the ultimate tool to build an education empire. If you have a big team, no other plan can give you up to 15 different admin accounts. This means that your instructors, tech support, and marketing team can all access the platform with individual permissions. Even better, Thinkific offers personalized onboarding and training services to help large businesses get started and be productive immediately. You'll also have access to more tools for customizing your [learning platform](https://elearningindustry.com/directory/software-categories/learning-management-systems "Learning Management Systems (LMS)") so it reflects your brand perfectly.

#### What's Not So Great?

While the Thinkific Expand plan offers tons of features, it's not without its cons. For instance, features like API access might be too complicated or unnecessary for users who can't deal with more advanced tech integrations. If you don't have a dedicated team to manage this, you may not get the full value. Also, if your business is small, you might feel like you're paying for tools that you don't need just yet until you scale up. In that case, the lower-tier plans might be a better fit.

#### Who Can Benefit From Thinkific's Expand Plan?

So, who is this plan really for? It's ideal for mid-to-large-sized online education businesses, organizations that are expanding quickly and need features like multiple admin accounts, educational institutions, large training companies, businesses with multiple products, and large teams. If your business needs to build communities, integrate the platform with other systems, or customize learners' experiences, this Thinkific pricing plan will help you achieve all your goals.

### Thinkific Plus Plan (Custom Rates)

#### Key Features Of The Plus Plan

Unlike other Thinkific pricing tiers, which come with standard fees per month, the Plus plan offers custom rates. This means pricing is tailored specifically to your business's unique needs, whether you're growing fast or handling large volumes of students. But it's not just the pricing flexibility that makes it special. It allows you to add your own branding to your courses and gives you API access to integrate Thinkific with your CRM or more complicated apps. Most importantly, though, it offers you dedicated support with your own Customer Success Manager, who's aware of your business needs and can offer targeted help. Not to mention the single sign-on (SSO) system which lets learners use existing login credentials, making it easier for them to access your content without creating new accounts.

#### What's Not So Great?

Those features are amazing, but many may be unnecessary or costly for small businesses. For instance, API access is useful but requires technical knowledge to operate. Plus, although you can customize your platform's features and pay accordingly, you're bound to end up with tools you won't need, as they come in bundles.

#### Who Can Benefit From Thinkific's Plus Plan?

The short answer is corporate training organizations. The ability to create private, branded learning modules and integrate them with existing systems makes Thinkific Plus perfect for delivering professional development or compliance training. Universities and institutions can also consider this Thinkific pricing plan, as they can manage multiple courses and departments more easily this way. In addition, as it can get costly to get the full pack with all the premium features, this plan best suits you if your courses are already expensive, so you can quickly get Return On Investment.

### What To Consider When Choosing A Thinkific Pricing Plan

When deciding on the best Thinkific pricing plan, consider your business size, course volume, and goals. For starters, the Free plan is great if you're just testing your abilities in course creation, while the Basic plan works well for creators looking for customization and monetization options. If you need more advanced tools, like app integrations and memberships, the Start or Grow plans offer more flexibility. Lastly, don't forget the custom Thinkific pricing plan, Plus, which is ideal for high-volume businesses needing branding, SSO, and more targeted support.

### Is There A Thinkific Alternative?

There are plenty of Thinkific alternatives, depending on what you're looking for. Kajabi, [Teachable](https://elearningindustry.com/directory/elearning-software/teachable "Teachable software"), and Podia are some popular options that offer similar course-building features. Yet, each has its pros and cons in terms of pricing, ease of use, and customization. When it comes to [Thinkific pricing](https://elearningindustry.com/directory/elearning-software/thinkific/pricing "Thinkific Pricing"), it offers a free plan, which sets it apart from competitors like [Kajabi](https://elearningindustry.com/directory/elearning-software/kajabi "Kajabi software"), which starts at a higher monthly fee. If you're comparing features and budgets, Thinkific might still be the most valuable option for many users.

### Final Thoughts On Thinkific Pricing

When it comes to Thinkific pricing, there's something for everyone, whether you're just starting or you are a pro who manages multiple courses. From the Free plan to custom rates in the Plus plan, Thinkific adjusts to your needs as your business grows. The flexibility of each pricing plan allows you to find the perfect fit based on your needs and budget.

### Thinkific Pricing Plans FAQs

#### Can I use Thinkific for free?

Yes. Thinkific offers a free plan that gives you access to limited but basic features, like hosting courses and engaging with your learners.

#### Does Thinkific charge transaction fees?

Thinkific Payments partners with Stripe to process payments. If you're in the US or Canada, you'll be charged a fee of 2.9% plus 30 cents for every successful credit card payment. The transaction fees vary based on the country where your business operates. For more detailed information on transaction fees, visit the Thinkific Help Center.

#### What is the difference between Thinkific Basic and Start?

The Basic plan gives you all the essential features, such as unlimited courses and a custom domain, for $49 per month. The Start plan adds more advanced features. It's perfect if you want to make your content more exclusive, as it offers membership and payment plan functionality, and it costs $99 per month.

#### How many courses can you host on Thinkific?

Unlimited with any paid pricing plan.

#### Is it possible to download my course from Thinkific?

Unfortunately, you can't download a full course. However, you can save your videos and PDFs from Thinkific directly in the Course Builder.

#### What is the maximum upload size for Thinkific?

Each file can be up to 2 GB. It's enough for high-quality content of any kind.

#### Can Thinkific be used as a website?

Yes. Thinkific allows you to create a fully branded site with pages for your courses and blogs.

#### Does Thinkific have a money-back guarantee?

Thinkific does not provide refunds unless an error was made on its part.

#### Do I need to pay for anything else?

In addition to the Thinkific pricing plan of your choice, you may have to pay extra for integrated apps or custom domains in some tiers.

# Which Thinkific Plan is Right for You?

By

###### Faith Uzuegbu

on

You’ve decided to [launch a digital product with Thinkific](https://www.thinkific.com/features/create-digital-products/), but you’re unsure which plan best meets your needs.

Then it’s a good thing you’re reading this piece. Here, we’ll go over the nuts and bolts of each Thinkific plan, including their pricing and features, to help you make the right choice.

## Thinkific pricing plans: an overview

Thinkific uses [tiered pricing](https://www.thinkific.com/blog/digital-product-pricing-strategy/) — that is, separate plans with different subscription fees. This gives you the flexibility to choose a plan that fits your needs and budget. The more expensive the plan, the more features you get.

Now, to the facts. Thinkific has four [pricing plans](https://www.thinkific.com/pricing/): Basic, Start, Grow, and Plus. All plans offer core features like zero transaction fees, unlimited courses and students, and free access to the Accelerator Program. There’s no free plan, but all plans except Plus come with a 14-day free trial.

Higher tiers offer all the features of the lower tier plus additional capabilities. For example, the Start Plan has all the features from the Basic Plan plus live lessons, membership, and payment plans, among other benefits.

Now that you have a general idea of Thinkific’s pricing structure, let’s discuss each plan in detail.

## Basic Plan: Best for beginner creators

If this is your first time launching a digital product, Thinkific’s Basic Plan is just right for you. It provides the core features for creating and selling a successful course without unnecessary overhead costs.

Specifically, you get:

- **Unlimited courses and students**: Launch as many courses as you want for an unlimited number of students. This lets you test different course formats and subjects until you find what works best. You can enroll as many students as possible for maximum return on investment.

- **Custom domain**: A custom domain is a unique web address that you can use to identify your website or online course. Instead of using a generic URL like “www.thinkific.com/yourcourse,” you can use your own branded domain name like “www.yourcourse.com.” This creates a more professional look for brand recognition.

- **100% content ownership:** You own all the content you create and sell on Thinkific, including course materials, videos, audio files, and written content. You have complete control over how you use this content and can distribute or sell it as you see fit. Thinkific does not claim any ownership or control over the content you create, and you are free to use it outside of the platform if you wish.

- **Fully integrated ecommerce**: You get access to [TCommerce](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/7302902582807-TCommerce-Powered-by-Thinkific-Payments), a suite of tools that help you sell your course seamlessly and manage your financial accounts. TCommerce features include one-click payment control, sales tax support, and transaction reporting.

**Pricing**: $36 per month (billed annually in USD)

## Start Plan: Best for mid-level creators looking to boost student engagement and participation

You’ve launched a few courses, but student engagement hasn’t been great across the board. That’s where Thinkific’s Start Plan comes in. It will empower you with the right tools and features to boost student participation and increase your digital product’s return on investment.

The Start Plan offers everything in the Basic tier, plus:

- **Live lessons**: Create and host live webinars or virtual classes to teach your students in real time, giving them the opportunity to ask questions and interact with you and their peers. It is a great way to add value to your courses and increase student satisfaction.

- **Assignments**: Add assignments to your course materials to test students’ knowledge, improve post-class engagement, and allow them to practice their learnings. You can include assignments for live and self-paced classes.

- **Memberships and payment plans**: With membership plans, you can create a community of learners who pay a recurring fee to access exclusive content or resources. This feature can help you generate recurring revenue and build a loyal following.

Payment plans, on the other hand, let you offer your courses at a lower upfront cost but with the option of paying over time. This can make your courses more accessible to a wider audience and increase your revenue in the long run.

**Pricing**: $74 per month (billed annually in USD)

**Learn more**: [How to create a membership site for your course](https://www.thinkific.com/blog/create-membership-site-thinkific-course/)

## Grow Plan: Best for experienced creators looking to launch multiple digital products

You’ve hit your stride with digital products. You have several successful courses under your belt and a strong student base. Now, you want to scale things, launch multiple products, and deliver your learning content to a wider student base. That’s exactly why we created the Grow Plan.

Thinkific’s Grow Plan gives you access to all of the Start features, plus:

- **Bulk emails and enrollments**: Engage your students at scale. With bulk emails, you can send personalized emails with course updates, promotional offers, and reminders about upcoming classes or assignments to your students.

Bulk enrollments, on the other hand, allow you to enroll multiple students in a course all at once, making the process more efficient.

- [**API access**](https://support.thinkific.dev/hc/en-us/articles/5700872617111-API-Overview): Integrate third-party applications with Thinkfiic’s course builder to expand its capabilities. Say you want to update students’ bio-data in your CRM platform automatically. You can use the API to sync Thinkific with your preferred CRM software and build out this workflow.

- **Brillium exams integration**: Administer exams, assessments, and quizzes as part of your courses via the Brillium assessment software. Brillium allows you to create fully customizable assessments with a wide range of question types, including multiple-choice, open-ended, and more. This means that you can tailor your assessments to students’ specific needs and requirements.

**Pricing**: $149 per month (billed annually in USD)

**Related**: [How to do a training needs assessment](https://www.thinkific.com/blog/training-needs-assessment-template/)

## Thinkific Plus: For enterprise businesses

[Thinkific Plus](https://www.thinkific.com/plus/) is a learning management system that helps enterprise businesses create and administer large-scale training for employees and customers efficiently. It includes all the features offered by the other plans, plus:

- **Multiple Thinkific sites**: Create separate sites for different courses. Organize courses by category or subject matter to make it easier for students to find and enroll in the courses they are interested in.

- **CRM integration**: Thinkific Plus has in-built CRM integrations for Salesforce, Hubspot, and similar tools. These integrations allow you to transfer student data from your Thinkific dashboard to your CRM for subsequent marketing campaigns and customer engagement.

- **Bulk sell checkout**: Sell courses and other digital products in bulk to other organizations easily. You can do this via your primary Thinkific Plus site or via a customized URL on the platform.

**Pricing**: Contact the sales team for a custom quote

**Learn more**: [The Ultimate Guide for Thinkific Plus](https://www.thinkific.com/evaluation-guide/)

## What to consider when choosing a Thinkific plan

Keep these three things when choosing a Thinkific plan to get the best value for your money.

- **Level of experience**: As a newbie creator, don’t get bogged down by a ton of features that you don’t need. Instead, choose Thinkific’s basic plan, which provides the essential features for launching a successful course or digital product. As you gain more experience, you can upgrade to higher plans with more advanced course creation and management features.

- **Budget**: If you have a large budget, you can opt for Thinkific Plus. But if you don’t, choose the Thinkific plan that offers the most bang for your buck.

To do this, you must be realistic about the must-have and nice-to-have features for your ideal course creation platform. Choose the plan that checks all your must-have features. You can always upgrade to other plans with nice-to-have features in the future.

- **Goals**: Consider what you want to achieve with the course or digital product. Say you’re an organization planning to create a course for staff training. In that case, you need Thinkific Plus, as it is a learning management system for enterprise businesses.

But if you plan to launch a course with other creators, you’ll need the Thinkific Plus Plan, as it allows for multiple course administrators and seamless revenue sharing.

## Create your first course with Thinkific.

Now that you know which Thinkific plan works best for different creators, the next step is creating your first course or digital product.

It’s pretty easy to do this. All you need to do is sign up for a free 14-day trial for your preferred plan to start creating. The platform is intuitive, plus our team is always available to answer your questions. You can also explore our robust customer education library for tutorials and step-by-step guides for creating courses with Thinkific.

[Start your free Thinkific trial](https://www.thinkific.com/get-started/general-free-trial/).

## Thinkific pricing plans FAQs.

Find answers to common questions about Thinkific plans.

### What is the difference between Thinkific Basic and Start?

Thinkific Basic is for beginner creators. It has the core features that help you create and launch digital products, such as a drag-and-drop builder, payment integrations, and custom subdomains.

Thinkific Start, on the other hand, is for experienced creators looking to improve student engagement and participation in their courses. Its features include membership and payment plans and assessments. Because it has more advanced features, Thinkific Start is more expensive than the Basic Plan.

### How many courses can you host on Thinkific?

You can host unlimited courses across all Thinkific plans. You can create communities across all plans, too; however, the number differs per plan.

### Can I use Thinkific for free?

Yes, you can use Thinkific for free for 14 days. At the end of the trial period, you’ll need to upgrade to one of the paid plans for continued access.

Thinkific is one of the most popular course platforms for educators, coaches, and entrepreneurs in 2026. With its all-in-one structure and flexible tools, Thinkific makes it easier to turn your expertise into a successful training business.

In this article, we talk about how much Thinkific costs in 2026, what features you get on each plan, whether there are hidden fees, and what other cheaper or more powerful alternatives are available.

## **Thinkific Pricing Plans in 2026**

Thinkific offers four main pricing plans:

|     |     |     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Plan | Monthly Price | Annual Price Paid Upfront | Transaction Fees | Best For |
| Basic | $49/month | $36/month ($432/year) | 0% | Creators launching their first course |
| Start | $99/month | $74/month ($888/year) | 0% | Growing course businesses |
| Grow | $199/month | $149/month ($1,788/year) | 0% | Advanced businesses scaling operations |
| Plus | Custom pricing | Custom pricing | 0% | Large enterprises |

Let’s explore each one.

## **Thinkific Basic Monthly & Annual Plan**

The Basic Plan is Thinkific’s entry plan and is targeted at beginners to course creation. At $49/month or $36/month ($432 paid upfront) if billed annually giving savings of $156 annually compared to the monthly plan.This plan unlocks a bunch of business-friendly features without being overwhelming.

### **What’s Included in the Basic Plan:**

- Unlimited courses
- 1 community
- 5 Coaching & Webinar sessions
- 5 Digital Downloads
- Sales tool
- Abandoned cart emails

### **Who Is It Best For?**

You should consider the Basic Plan if:

- You’re launching your first paid course
- You don’t need advanced marketing and sales tools
- You’re on a budget

## **Thinkific Start Monthly & Annual Plan**

The Start Plan is where things start getting interesting. This plan costs $99/month for the monthly plan or $74/month if billed annually ($888 paid upfront), you get decent savings of $300 annually compared to the monthly plan. This plan is built for creators who want to grow their online school and optimize the student experience.

### **What’s Included:**

Everything in the Basic Plan, plus:

- Unlimited Live Lessons
- Unlimited Memberships
- Unlimited Digital Downloads
- Unlimited Coaching & Webinar sessions
- Edit HTML & CSS
- Sell Bundles and Add-ons

### **Who Should Use It?**

You should pick the Start Plan if:

- You have a successful, growing course business
- You plan to host live coaching calls or workshops
- You need more content flexibility
- You need a more customized experience

## **Thinkific Grow Monthly & Annual Plan**

If you’re running a serious online education business, the Grow Plan offers advanced tools to help you scale. Billed at $199/month for the monthly plan or $149/month for the annual plan which gives impressive savings of $600, it gives you deeper analytics, expanded admin access, and priority support.

### **What You Get:**

All Start Plan features, plus:

- 3 communities
- Remove Thinkific branding
- Thinkific Analytics
- Group Orders
- Invoicing
- Gifting
- API Access

### **Who Is It For?**

Go with Grow if:

- You have multiple courses
- You want to build engaged community of learners
- You manage a team and need multi-admin access
- You're scaling up course sales and need advanced data
- You want priority help and more backend flexibility

## **Thinkific Plus Monthly & Annual Plan**

This plan is designed for high-growth businesses. It unlocks enterprise-level features such as advanced integrations, and tailored support to scale your online learning business.

## **Thinkific Pricing Plan Comparison**

|     |     |     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Feature | Basic | Start | Grow | Plus |
| Monthly Price | $49 | $99 | $199 | Custom pricing |
| Annual Price | $432 ($36/mo) | $888 ($74/mo) | $1,788 ($149/mo) | Custom pricing |
| Courses | Unlimited | Unlimited | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| Communities | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Live Lessons | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Affiliate Reporting | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Priority Support | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Custom Domain | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |

## **Are There Any Hidden Fees?**

Unlike other platforms, Thinkific has no transaction fees on any of its plans. However, you’ll still pay standard payment processing fees through Stripe or PayPal. These are typically:

- Stripe: 2.9% + 30¢ per transaction
- PayPal: Around 3.49% + a fixed fee depending on region

These fees are industry standard and aren’t unique to Thinkific.

You might need to spend some extra money paying for advanced email marketing and sales tools since Thinkifc has only basic tools but this is optional.

## **Which Thinkific Plan Should You Choose?**

Here’s a simple way to decide:

- Launching your first course? Go with the Basic Plan.
- Growing your business and want live lessons, communities, and more? Choose the Start Plan.
- Scaling with a team and need powerful analytics and dev options? Go with the Grow plan.
- In need of enterprise level features and customization? Talk to sales for the Plus plan.

## **Thinkific Free Plan**

Thinkific used to have a free plan but as of 2026, it no longer exists. The old free plan allowed users to create1 course and provided full access to Thinkific’s course builder. Thinkific now offers a 14 day free trial that gives you a feel of what the platform offers.

## **Cheaper Alternatives to Thinkific in 2026**

Thinkific is a solid product, but not necessarily the cheapest. If you're tight on budget or need something simpler or more niche, here are some alternatives:

### **1\. SchoolMaker**: $29/month starting price

- Zero transaction fee on all plans
- Sell courses and coaching
- Strong course builder and community features

**Why it’s great:** You get unique features to help you sell more courses.

### **3\. Podia:** Starts at $33/month

- Sell multiple digital products
- Built-in email marketing

**Why it’s good:** Offers better email tools and a website builder than Thinkific at a lower price point.

### **4\. Teachable:** Starts at $29/month

- Popular course platform like Thinkific
- Free plan available (with $1 + 10% fee)

**Why it’s comparable:** Similar functionality to Thinkific with slightly more focus on ease of use and mobile-friendly experiences.

## **Is Thinkific’s Pricing Worth It?**

Yes it is, but there are cheaper alternatives if you’re price sensitive.Thinkific delivers a solid experience, is beginner-friendly, doesn’t charge transaction fees, and scales well as your business grows.

## **Conclusion**

Thinkific continues to be one of the top choices for course creators in 2026, offering transparent pricing, no hidden fees, and a professional toolset to help you grow.

Whether you're launching your first course or managing a full-blown online academy, there's likely a Thinkific plan that fits your goal, and if not, there are plenty of cheaper alternatives to consider.
